commands.repair_reason: Manual review is needed because the PR is draft/protected, carries a release and supply-chain boundary decision, and needs contributor-provided current-head real behavior proof.; Needs attention: Needs attention because a runtime filesystem-safety package is sourced from GitHub while the npm release guard still permits that source spec.; Review finding: [P1] Reject GitHub fs-safe specs before release — scripts/openc... (sha=d3cfc8e9b7ec15d40a3765ef2e857571c4251513)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves OpenClaw filesystem safety helpers to `@openclaw/fs-safe` and rewires core, plugin SDK, plugin call sites, docs, tests, build metadata, and release checks around that package boundary.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of PR head d3cfc8e9 shows runtime imports from `@openclaw/fs-safe`, a GitHub dependency spec, a codeload lockfile entry, and release validation that only rejects local dependency specs.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the PR is draft/protected, carries a release and supply-chain boundary decision, and needs contributor-provided current-head real behavior proof.
